steps.title: Identify the contradiction
steps.content: The passage describes Paris as “ideal” where she's “making a name for herself,” but then reveals she “longed to return to India.” This unexpected reversal is the key signal.

steps.title: Apply the transition to the choices
steps.content: ”Still” means “however,” signaling the contradiction directly. The remaining choices either reinforce the initial setup (Indeed, Furthermore) or create a false cause-and-effect (Therefore). That matches choice A — A is correct.
